messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration. We're currently 80% complete and everything is on track for a Friday delivery.

Let me know if you have any questions or need further details.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

content.delta: The email has been sent to alice@example.com with the requested subject and summary. Let me know if there’s anything else you need!
